title: clematis tangutica subsp. tangutica
intro: Clematis tangutica subsp. tangutica, also known as the Chinese clematis or Tangut clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Clematis tangutica subsp. tangutica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce the risk of infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture or dried extract to harness its medicinal properties.
